% Euler-angle-sector Fokker--Planck coefficients for impulsive
% encounters with a GENERIC spherical perturber (kick covariances
% Q_r(r), Q_t(r)); generated by check_impulsive_general.py.
% Notation: overline{X} = (1/2pi) Int X (1 - e cos E) dE is the
% orbit average (eqn:orbit_average); tilde-r = 1 - e cos E = r/a.
% These expressions are NOT in the paper; they were derived with
% the same machinery that reproduces every published coefficient,
% and transform to the paper's body-frame results via eqn:Matrix.
\begin{align}
B^\Omega &= \frac{ \left[- 2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(i \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[- 4 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(i \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e^{2} - 2\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(i \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) } ,\\
B^i &= \frac{ \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right) \cos{\left(i \right)}\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[2 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right) \cos{\left(i \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[- a \left(e^{2} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} + 1\right) \cos{\left(i \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ 2 G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \sin{\left(i \right)} } ,\\
B^\omega &= \frac{ \left[2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \left(\cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[4 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(\cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[- a \left(e^{2} - 2\right) \left(\cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ 2 G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) } ,\\
D^{\Omega\Omega} &= \frac{ \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right)\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[- 2 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e^{2} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) } ,\\
D^{\Omega i} &= \frac{ \left[- 2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[- 4 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e^{2} - 2\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \sin{\left(i \right)} } ,\\
D^{\Omega\omega} &= \frac{ \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right) \cos{\left(i \right)}\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[2 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right) \cos{\left(i \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[- a \left(e^{2} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} + 1\right) \cos{\left(i \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) } ,\\
D^{ii} &= \frac{ \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right)\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[- 2 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e^{2} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - e^{2} - 2 \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) } ,\\
D^{i\omega} &= \frac{ \left[2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(i \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[4 a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(i \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[- a \left(e^{2} - 2\right) \sin{\left(\omega \right)} \cos{\left(i \right)} \cos{\left(\omega \right)}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} }{ G e^{2} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \sin{\left(i \right)} } ,\\
D^{\omega\omega} &= \frac{ \left[- 2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{3} \left(e + 1\right)^{3} \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-1} Q_r} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{Q_r} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{4} \left(e + 1\right)^{4} \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-2} Q_r} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 e^{2} \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - e^{2} + 2 \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} - 2\right)\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[- 2 a e^{2} \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(2 \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 2 \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e^{4} \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} - 2 e^{2} \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} \cos^{2}{\left(\omega \right)} + e^{2} + \cos^{2}{\left(i \right)} - 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{4} \left(e + 1\right)^{4} \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-2} Q_t} }{ G e^{4} m \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} - 1\right) \left(\cos{\left(i \right)} + 1\right) } ,\\
D^{\omega M_0} &= \frac{ \left[- 2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{3} \left(e + 1\right)^{3}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-1} Q_r} + \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 e^{2} - 1\right)\right] \overline{Q_r} + \left[2 a e^{2} \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_r} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{4} \left(e + 1\right)^{4}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-2} Q_r} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \left(e^{2} + 2\right)\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[2 a e^{2} \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{4} \left(e + 1\right)^{4}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-2} Q_t} }{ G e^{4} m \sqrt{1 - e^{2}} } ,\\
D^{M_0 M_0} &= \frac{ \left[2 a \left(e - 1\right)^{3} \left(e + 1\right)^{3}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-1} Q_r} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \cdot \left(2 e - 1\right) \left(2 e + 1\right)\right] \overline{Q_r} + \left[- 4 a e^{2} \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_r} + \left[4 a e^{4}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_r} + \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{4} \left(e + 1\right)^{4}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-2} Q_r} + \left[a \left(e - 1\right)^{2} \left(e + 1\right)^{2} \left(e^{2} + 2\right)\right] \overline{Q_t} + \left[- 2 a e^{2} \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{1} Q_t} + \left[a \left(e - 1\right) \left(e + 1\right)\right] \overline{\tilde r^{2} Q_t} + \left[- a \left(e - 1\right)^{4} \left(e + 1\right)^{4}\right] \overline{\tilde r^{-2} Q_t} }{ G e^{4} m } .
\end{align}
